About Me

Passionate About
Turning Data Into
Decisions

I'm a 3rd-year Computer Science student at Beni Suef University, specializing in Data Science. My journey started with curiosity about how numbers tell stories — now I build dashboards, perform exploratory data analysis, and derive insights that help businesses make smarter decisions.

Through freelancing on Mostaql, I've worked with 3 clients across sales, call center, and automotive domains. I'm currently expanding my skills toward Machine Learning and BI DevOps to become a full-stack data professional.

Data Science Major Data Analytics Python Power BI SQL

Portfolio

Featured Projects

7 projects spanning Excel dashboards, Power BI reports, and Python analysis — including freelance work for 3 clients.

ExcelFreelance

Electronics & Furniture Sales Dashboard

Interactive Excel dashboard analyzing sales across electronics and furniture categories. Features monthly trends, branch distribution, category breakdowns, and key KPIs including total sales of $11.16M and average order value of $2,617.

Client Project — Mostaql
Power BIFreelance

Bike Store — Europe Sales Dashboard

Comprehensive Power BI dashboard for a European bike store chain (2011–2016). Tracks $85.27M revenue, $32.22M profit, and 1.35M units sold. Visualizes category splits (Bikes 72%, Accessories 18%, Clothing 10%), sub-category performance, and yearly trends.

Client Project — Mostaql
Power BIFreelance

Multi-Dimensional Revenue Analytics

Advanced Power BI dashboard with country-level filtering (Australia focus), max revenue tracking ($58,074), product category and sub-category breakdowns, yearly revenue trends, and demographic quantity distribution. Demonstrates DAX measures and interactive slicers.

Client Project — Mostaql
PythonEDA

Superstore Sales — Data Exploration

Initial data loading and exploration of the Sample Superstore dataset using Pandas. Ingested CSV data with proper encoding, inspected first records, and laid the groundwork for comprehensive EDA as part of the CodeAlpha internship.

CodeAlpha Internship
PythonPandas

Superstore — Dataset Profiling & Inspection

Deep dataset profiling of 9,994 records across 21 columns. Analyzed data types, identified float64 vs string columns, ran descriptive statistics, and verified data integrity using df.info(), df.describe(), and df.shape.

CodeAlpha Internship
PythonVisualization

Sales Distribution & Profit Analysis

Visualized the distribution of sales using histograms, revealing heavy right-skew with most transactions in lower ranges. Computed profit statistics (mean $28.66, min -$6,599.98) identifying key outliers and loss-making orders.

CodeAlpha Internship
PythonPower BIMaven Challenge

Category Sales & Profit Breakdown + Maven Crowdfunding Challenge

Analyzed Superstore category performance — Technology leads sales ($8.84M) with highest profit ($145K), while Furniture generates $750K in sales but only $18.4K profit. Extended analysis to Maven Crowdfunding Challenge, analyzing 375K+ Kickstarter projects.
